text: Last month I booked the flight to Lisbon.
Two days ago I took a taxi to the airport.
It depends on the airline, and it depends on your ticket.
Good morning. I booked a flight to Lisbon.
I have one checked bag and one carry-on.
I would like an aisle seat, please.
Is there a problem with my bag? How much is the fee?
Could I have my boarding pass? What time is boarding?

Good morning, and welcome to Terminal 3. This is an announcement for all passengers on the flight to Lisbon. Before you come to the counter, please have your passport ready. Here is the information about your bags. Your ticket includes one checked bag of twenty-three kilos, and one small bag with you in the cabin. This is your luggage allowance. If your bag is heavier than twenty-three kilos, this is excess baggage, and there is a fee of one hundred dollars. The fee depends on the weight, and it depends on your ticket, so please ask the agent at the counter. You can also choose your seat at the counter: a window seat, or an aisle seat. Boarding time today is eleven forty, at gate twenty-two. Thank you very much, and have a good flight.

Hello. My name is Marta, and I am in the line for the Lisbon flight, like you. Can I tell you what I did? Last month I booked this flight on the internet, and I chose an aisle seat, because I am tall and I like to stand up and walk. Two days ago I packed my bag, and last night I packed it again, because it was too heavy. My luggage allowance is twenty-three kilos, and my bag was twenty-six. So I took out two books and a pair of shoes, and I put them in my carry-on. This morning I took a taxi, I arrived early, at eight o'clock, and I had a coffee here. I did not pay any fee. My boarding time is eleven forty, so I have two hours. Two hours is a long time, but I am not in a hurry. And you? What did you do?
Last month I booked the flight to Lisbon.
Two days ago we took a taxi to the airport.
I did not pay the fee.
Did you pack this bag yourself?
Good morning. I booked a flight to Lisbon.
I packed my bag yesterday, and I chose an aisle seat.
I have one checked bag and one carry-on.
Is there a problem with my bag? How much is the fee?
Could I have my boarding pass? What time is boarding?
I would like an aisle seat, please.
